SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface SpecificationElement

All Known Subinterfaces:
AuxiliaryContract, BlockContract, ClassInvariant, Contract, DependencyContract, FunctionalOperationContract, InformationFlowContract, InitiallyClause, LoopContract, LoopSpecification, MergeContract, OperationContract
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl, BlockContractImpl, BlockWellDefinedness, ClassAxiom, ClassAxiomImpl, ClassInvariantImpl, ClassWellDefinedness, ContractAxiom, DependencyContractImpl, FunctionalAuxiliaryContract, FunctionalBlockContract, FunctionalLoopContract, FunctionalOperationContractImpl, InformationFlowContractImpl, InitiallyClauseImpl, LoopContractImpl, LoopSpecImpl, LoopWellDefinedness, MethodWellDefinedness, ModelMethodExecution, PartialInvAxiom, PredicateAbstractionMergeContract, QueryAxiom, RepresentsAxiom, StatementWellDefinedness, UnparameterizedMergeContract, WellDefinednessCheck
public interface SpecificationElement
Common superinterface of all constructs created by the specification language front ends and managed by SpecificationRepository.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getDisplayName()
    Returns the displayed name.
    KeYJavaType
    getKJT()
    Returns the KeYJavaType representing the class/interface to which the specification element belongs.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.
    @Nullable VisibilityModifier
    getVisibility()
    Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
    SpecificationElement
    map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
    Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.

    • getDisplayName

      String getDisplayName()
      Returns the displayed name.

    • getVisibility

      @Nullable VisibilityModifier getVisibility()
      Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)

    • getKJT

      KeYJavaType getKJT()
      Returns the KeYJavaType representing the class/interface to which the specification element belongs.

    • map

      SpecificationElement map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.
